auth.localMode: Local mode — create an account to sync your tasks.
auth.notLoggedInProfile: You must be logged in to view your profile.
auth.notLoggedInSettings: You must be logged in to access settings.

verify.title: Account Created Successfully
verify.message: A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the link to verify your account.
verify.success: Verification email has been resent successfully.

cookie.message: We use Matomo (self-hosted) to understand how toBear is used. No data is shared with third parties.

premium.title: toBear Premium
premium.subtitle: Sync your tasks across all your devices and unlock more features.

pwa.title: Install toBear
pwa.description: Add toBear to your home screen for quick access, even offline.
pwa.descriptionIos: Tap the share icon then "Add to Home Screen" to install toBear as an app.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A problem, a suggestion, or just a hello — write to us.
contact.thankYouMessage: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.bugReport: Prefer to report a technical bug?
contact.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.errorTooMany: You have sent too many messages, please try again later.
contact.errorGeneric: Error sending message. Please try again.
